query: SELECT id, contactName, teamMemberName, duration, status, callTimestamp, createdAt FROM calls WHERE contactName LIKE '%Prince%' OR contactName LIKE '%Crumley%' OR contactName LIKE '%Hampton%' OR contactName LIKE '%Safi%' OR contactName LIKE '%Balboa%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT id, contactName, teamMemberName, duration, status, callTimestamp, createdAt FROM calls WHERE contactName LIKE '%Prince%' OR contactName LIKE '%Crumley%' OR contactName LIKE '%Hampton%' OR contactName LIKE '%Safi%' OR contactName LIKE '%Balboa%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 20;
